Operation 'listAllPets' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description lack critical details. AI agents need to understand pagination support and available filters to use this operation effectively.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of all pets
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all pets in the system. Supports filtering, sorting, and pagination through query parameters. Returns a PetListResponse containing an array of Pet objects with complete pet information including medical history, owner details, and veterinary records. Requires bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack critical details. The operation has 12 parameters suggesting filtering/sorting/pagination capabilities that should be documented. Missing information about response structure (PetListResponse), authentication requirements, and what pet data is included. AI agents need to understand pagination support and available filters to use this operation effectively.

message: Operation 'createPet' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is completely empty. Summary is too generic. Missing critical information about what data is required (CreatePetRequest schema), what is returned (Pet object with ID), authentication requirements, and side effects (pet becomes available for operations). AI agents need to understand the complete lifecycle impact of this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new pet record in the Digitail veterinary platform. Accepts a CreatePetRequest containing pet information such as name, species, breed, age, and owner details. Returns the newly created Pet object with an assigned unique identifier and timestamp. Requires bearer token authentication. The pet record becomes immediately available for veterinary operations and medical record tracking.
data.reasoning: Description is completely empty. Summary is too generic. Missing critical information about what data is required (CreatePetRequest schema), what is returned (Pet object with ID), authentication requirements, and side effects (pet becomes available for operations). AI agents need to understand the complete lifecycle impact of this operation.

message: Operation 'retrievePet' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Description is empty and summary lacks specificity about the ID parameter. Missing information about what data is returned (complete Pet object with medical/vaccination details), authentication requirements, and error handling. AI agents need to know the pet ID is required and what comprehensive data will be returned.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific pet by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific pet identified by its unique ID. Returns a complete Pet object containing all pet attributes including medical history, owner information, vaccination records, and veterinary notes. Requires bearer token authentication. Returns 404 if the pet ID does not exist.
data.reasoning: Description is empty and summary lacks specificity about the ID parameter. Missing information about what data is returned (complete Pet object with medical/vaccination details), authentication requirements, and error handling. AI agents need to know the pet ID is required and what comprehensive data will be returned.

message: Operation 'updatePet' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description mentions the PATCH header override but lacks essential context. Missing information about partial update support, what UpdatePetRequest contains, what is returned, and side effects of the update. The description should clarify that this is a partial update operation (not a full replacement) and that changes are immediately available. AI agents need to understand the update semantics and that only specified fields are modified.

data.current_description: Updates a pet record. Uses X-HTTP-METHOD-OVERRIDE: PATCH header.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing pet record identified by its unique ID. Accepts an UpdatePetRequest containing the pet fields to be modified. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified while existing data remains unchanged. Requires the X-HTTP-METHOD-OVERRIDE: PATCH header and bearer token authentication. Returns the updated Pet object with all current information. Changes are immediately reflected in the veterinary platform.
data.reasoning: Current description mentions the PATCH header override but lacks essential context. Missing information about partial update support, what UpdatePetRequest contains, what is returned, and side effects of the update. The description should clarify that this is a partial update operation (not a full replacement) and that changes are immediately available. AI agents need to understand the update semantics and that only specified fields are modified.
